title: Services & SLAs

warning.title: Changes apply to NEW tickets only
warning.body: Existing tickets will continue with their original SLA

manage.title: Manage Departments & SLAs
manage.activateToEdit: Activate department to edit SLA settings
manage.archiveTitle: Archive department (hides from new tickets, preserves history)

dialog.deptRequiredMsg: Please select a department to add the service to.
dialog.dupServiceMsg: A service with this name already exists in this department!
dialog.dupServiceMsgDept: A service with this name already exists in {{dept}}!
dialog.validationMsg: All services must have a key and label
dialog.discardMsg: Are you sure you want to discard your unsaved changes?
dialog.archiveDeptMsg:
This department will be hidden from new ticket creation but all existing tickets and history will remain intact.

You can reactivate it later if needed.
dialog.activateDeptMsg: This department will be available for new ticket creation again.

sla.confirm:
This will apply to new tickets only.

Existing tickets will continue with their original SLA. Do you want to proceed?
sla.title: Edit SLA Policy
sla.targetHint: Time staff has to complete the task
sla.warnHint: When to show warning before SLA breach
sla.escalationHint: Additional time before escalating to supervisor

addService.title: Add New Service
addService.subtitle: Create a custom service for a specific department
addService.activeHint: Service will be immediately available for requests.
addService.inactiveHint: Inactive services are hidden from guest requests.

addServiceSelection.title: Add Service
addServiceSelection.subtitle: Choose how you want to add services to this department
addServiceSelection.fromTemplatesDesc1: Quickly add predefined services with standard SLAs.
addServiceSelection.fromTemplatesDesc2: Only templates not already added will appear.
addServiceSelection.customDesc: Create a department-specific service with optional SLA override.

addServiceTemplate.title: Add Services from Templates
addServiceTemplate.subtitle: Select services to add from the available templates. Only services that haven't been added yet are shown.
addServiceTemplate.noNew: No new templates available for this department.

addDeptSelection.title: Add Department
addDeptSelection.subtitle: Choose how you want to add a department
addDeptSelection.fromTemplatesDesc: Quickly add standard departments with predefined settings.
addDeptSelection.customDesc: Manually configure a new department with specific settings.

addDeptTemplate.title: Add Departments from Templates
addDeptTemplate.subtitle: Select departments to add from the available templates. Only departments that haven't been added yet are shown.
addDeptTemplate.noNew: No new template departments available. All templates are already added.
